name: Memories of the Past
description: Faint echoes of a life before the end of the world.

results.text: The faint hum of an ancient lullaby that calms the chaos within.
A scar, faded but permanent, on your arm—proof of a battle with a beast.
A small piece of jewellery, worn and frayed—the last piece of a loved one.
The scent of pine, thick and green, floods your senses when you close your eyes.
The warrior's chant, learned from an elder who spoke with the weight of the world.
You once witnessed something divine, something that defied reason.
A scrap of cloth, worn and frayed at the edges, from someone who disappeared too soon.
The taste of a long-lost meal, the warmth of it still lingering on your tongue.
A broken piece of a childhood toy, its edges chipped and its colour faded.
The whispers of ancestors fill your mind during quiet meditation.
A battle won, a victory that still burns bright in your memory.
The first snowfall of every winter, a feeling both joyous and sorrowful.
There's a place you dream of returning to, but it feels further out of reach.
A stormy night, the wind howling like an omen, brings memories of an escape.
A melody, almost forgotten now, from your youth.
The day you saw a god, something so real and yet so unbelievable.
The warmth of a fire, surrounded by family, telling stories beneath the stars.
A lost friend, whose voice sometimes still comes to you in dreams.
An old tale from your mentor's lips, one that still haunts you.
The vow you made, all those years ago—one that shapes everything you do now.
